definition: A registered source of title text that takes part in the composed document.title rather than writing it directly. Declares a title layer (base / template / decoration / transient) and a contribute(current) function returning its share given the lower layers' result. The route base title, a site template, the Notification Marker count prefix, and a transient 'Saving…' override are all title contributors.
usage: Defined by the CustomTitleContributor plug; folded into one string and written once by CustomTitleRegistry. Lets many independent sources influence the title without clobbering one another.
